design_strategy.target_audience: Crypto Investors, Online Bankers, Privacy-Conscious Professionals

headings.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Feature names

monospace.usage: OTP codes, Phone numbers, Pricing figures, Crypto addresses

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-medium py-3 px-6 rounded-lg transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/10 font-medium py-3 px-6 rounded-lg backdrop-blur-sm transition-all

cards.base: bg-neutral-900/50 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-8 shadow-2xl hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300
cards.pricing_highlight: relative bg-gradient-to-b from-neutral-800 to-neutral-900 border border-yellow-500/30 shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(255,215,0,0.1)]

inputs.base: bg-neutral-950 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-neutral-500 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 transition-all outline-none
inputs.otp: w-12 h-14 text-center text-2xl font-mono bg-neutral-900 border border-white/20 rounded-md focus:border-green-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-green-400/20 transition-all

gradients.hero_glow: absolute -z-10 top-0 right-0 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-blue-600/20 rounded-full blur-[120px]
gradients.bottom_glow: absolute -z-10 bottom-0 left-0 w-[400px] h-[400px] bg-green-500/10 rounded-full blur-[100px]

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Chivo' font for all headings to give a strong, tech-forward look.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for anything related to numbers, OTPs, or crypto addresses.
Implement the 'Fortress Dark' theme. The app should feel like a secure vault.
Use 'Glassmorphism' heavily for cards to imply 'bulletproof glass'.
For the OTP input, use the segmented input pattern (6 separate boxes).
Ensure high contrast: Text must be readable against the dark background. Use standard 'text-neutral-300' for body text, not full white.
For the 'Lifetime' plan, use Gold accents (#FFD700) to make it stand out as the premium choice.
Use the 'Signal Green' color ONLY for verified states (e.g., 'Number Active', 'Identity Verified').
Do NOT use gradients on text. Keep text solid for maximum readability.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures/noise overlays separate good from extraordinary.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
